SEARCH
Package compiler.simulation

Class ProgramCritterInterpreter

java.lang.Object
compiler.simulation.ProgramCritterInterpreter
All Implemented Interfaces:
InterpreterVisitor
public final class ProgramCritterInterpreter extends Object implements InterpreterVisitor
Interprets a parsed AST program for one critter. The interpreter operates on the critter's owned memory array rather than maintaining its own.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program program)
    Creates an interpreter with a default random source.
    ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program program, Random random)
    Creates an interpreter with an explicit random source.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getMemoryValue(int index)
    Reads a value from the critter's memory array (for testing/debugging).

    Returns the backing program (immutable reference).
    int
    getRuleCount()
    Returns the number of rules in the backing program.
    Action
    interpret(Critter critter, World world)
    Chooses the next action for a critter in the current world state.
    InterpreterVisitor
    offspringCopy()
    Creates an interpreter copy suitable for an offspring critter.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProgramCritterInterpreter

      public ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program program)
      Creates an interpreter with a default random source.
      Parameters:
      program - parsed program to execute

    • ProgramCritterInterpreter

      public ProgramCritterInterpreter(Program program, Random random)
      Creates an interpreter with an explicit random source.
      Parameters:
      program - parsed program to execute
      random - randomness source for random sensor/action behavior

  • Method Details

    • interpret

      public Action interpret(Critter critter, World world)
      Description copied from interface: InterpreterVisitor
      Chooses the next action for a critter in the current world state.
      Specified by:
      interpret in interface InterpreterVisitor
      Parameters:
      critter - acting critter
      world - world snapshot/mutable context
      Returns:
      action to execute this turn

    • getMemoryValue

      public int getMemoryValue(int index)
      Reads a value from the critter's memory array (for testing/debugging).
      Parameters:
      index - memory index
      Returns:
      stored value, or zero for out-of-range indices

    • getRuleCount

      public int getRuleCount()
      Returns the number of rules in the backing program.
      Returns:
      rule count

    • getProgram

      public Program getProgram()
      Returns the backing program (immutable reference).
      Returns:
      program AST

    • offspringCopy

      public InterpreterVisitor offspringCopy()
      Description copied from interface: InterpreterVisitor
      Creates an interpreter copy suitable for an offspring critter.
      Specified by:
      offspringCopy in interface InterpreterVisitor
      Returns:
      interpreter instance for offspring behavior
